task_completion.description: Configure the SMTP mail server with the specified settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: ADAudit Plus Mail Server settings page showing Server Name 'smtp.internal.corp', Port '465', Connection Security 'SSL', From Address 'adaudit-noreply@internal.corp', and Admin Mail Address 'itadmin@internal.corp'.

task_completion.description: Create the compliance auditor technician account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: ADAudit Plus Technicians list or creation page showing a user with Login Name 'gdpr_auditor', Role 'Auditor', and Email 'gdpr.audit@internal.corp'.

task_completion.description: Schedule the daily PDF report for user account changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: ADAudit Plus Scheduled Reports page showing a report named 'User Account Changes - Daily' with frequency 'Daily' (or daily schedule) and recipient 'it-team@internal.corp'.

task_completion.description: Schedule the weekly PDF report for privileged access.
task_completion.visual_evidence: ADAudit Plus Scheduled Reports page showing a report named 'Privileged Access Weekly' with frequency 'Weekly' (scheduled for Wednesday) and recipient 'security@internal.corp'.
ADAudit Plus Event Collection Status or Notification settings page showing the notification email 'noc@internal.corp' and a frequency or interval of '4 Hours'.

integrity.description: The agent used the ADAudit Plus web interface to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating and interacting with the ADAudit Plus web application at http://localhost:8081/ in a web browser.

integrity.description: Settings were genuinely entered into the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Values are visible in the actual input fields, dropdowns, or configuration lists of the ADAudit Plus interface, not typed into a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts or direct database modifications to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No PowerShell, SQL, or command-line scripts were used to insert the configuration directly into the backend.
